summary: Starting Location Picker feature testing complete. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All features working after fixes.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/routes/starting_locations - returns 36+ dockable locations - PASS
BACKEND: GET /api/routes/starting_locations - returns only city/station/rest_stop types - PASS
BACKEND: GET /api/routes/starting_locations - has required fields (id, name, system, type) - PASS
BACKEND: GET /api/routes/starting_locations - includes Stanton, Pyro, Nyx systems - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip with origin_id - returns origin in response - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip without origin_id - backwards compatible (origin=null) - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip with origin - route starts from origin location - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip with origin - includes extra leg from origin - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip with invalid origin_id - handles gracefully (origin=null) - PASS
BACKEND: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip with origin same as store - works correctly - PASS
BACKEND: Various origin types (city, station, rest_stop) all work - PASS
FRONTEND: Loadout page loads with tabs - PASS
FRONTEND: Ship selection and item equipping works - PASS
FRONTEND: Shopping List modal opens correctly - PASS
FRONTEND: Start Location picker appears with 37 options in 3 system groups - PASS
FRONTEND: Selecting origin recalculates route and updates stats (Mkm, travel time) - PASS
FRONTEND: START marker (triangle + text) appears on SVG when origin set - PASS
FRONTEND: Reset to Auto clears origin and removes START marker - PASS

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: byStore.map is not a function error in ShoppingListModal
bugs_fixed_during_testing.cause: Initial state had byStore as {} (object) but code expected array
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed initial state to byStore: [] and added Array.isArray() safety check

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Start location picker options not loading in builder view
bugs_fixed_during_testing.cause: API prop was not passed to ShoppingListModal in builder view (line 722)
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added API={API} prop to ShoppingListModal in builder view

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: SVG selector was finding Lucide MapPin icon instead of route SVG
bugs_fixed_during_testing.cause: Generic selector '[data-testid="shopping-route-map"] svg' found wrong element
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added data-testid="shopping-route-svg" to route SVG for specific selection

context_for_next_testing_agent: Starting location picker feature complete. Backend: GET /api/routes/starting_locations returns 36 dockable locations grouped by system. POST /api/routes/shopping_trip accepts optional origin_id to set start point. Frontend: ShoppingRouteMap component has <select data-testid='start-location-picker'> with optgroups by system. When origin is selected, API returns updated route with 'origin' object, and SVG displays START marker (triangle + text). Dropdown grouped by: Nyx (2 locations), Pyro (2 locations), Stanton (32 locations).

frontend_features: Start Location dropdown with 37 options (1 Auto + 36 dockable locations)
Options grouped by star system (Nyx, Pyro, Stanton)
Selecting origin recalculates route via API
START marker (cyan triangle) appears on SVG map
Route stats update (distance, travel time) when origin changes
Reset to Auto clears origin and shows original route
